tasks.label: Run AbhaySQL.sql (MySQL stable)
tasks.command: Write-Host 'MySQL will ask for your password, then show query output below.'; $mysql='C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin\mysql.exe'; Get-Content '.\AbhaySQL.sql' | & $mysql -u root -p --table

tasks.label: Run Selected SQL From Clipboard (Safe)
tasks.command: $mysql='C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin\mysql.exe'; $sql=Get-Clipboard; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($sql)) { Write-Error 'Clipboard is empty. Copy selected SQL first.'; exit 1 }; $sql | & $mysql -u root -p

tasks.label: Setup database from script
tasks.command: Write-Host 'MySQL will ask for your password, then show table output below.'; $mysql='C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin\mysql.exe'; Get-Content '.\setup_database.sql' | & $mysql -u root -p --table
